concerns.text: FR-001 contains a broken URL placeholder: '...at the canonical URL , extracting...'. The URL is missing, making the requirement impossible to execute. This is a writing defect (missing data) rather than a coverage gap, as the requirement itself is anchored to US-1.

The first Assumption contains a broken URL placeholder: '...via `archive.org` (specifically `) contains...'. The specific dataset path/URL is missing. While this is an assumption, the missing link prevents verification of the data source mentioned in FR-001.
